stories.headline: BTC stalls at $80K wall as crypto market sheds 2.3% to $2.65T
stories.tldr: Bitcoin failed a fourth attempt at $80,000 and slid to $77,005, pulling total crypto market cap down 2.3% to $2.65 trillion ahead of this week's Fed decision.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Concentrated sell orders are capping every rally despite record stablecoin liquidity, signaling distribution by large holders right as macro risk peaks.
the_details: BTC -2.75% to $77,005 on $35.2B volume; ETH -4.3% to $2,293 with $16B turnover.
Bitcoin still up ~13.6% in April, on pace for its best month in a year if it holds.
BTC dominance climbs to 58.1% as altcoins absorb the brunt of the selloff.

stories.headline: Aave rallies DeFi partners to contain $292M Kelp DAO contagion
stories.tldr: Aave is coordinating a multi-protocol bailout after Kelp DAO's $292M LayerZero exploit left $10B of Aave deposits drained in a deposit run last week.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: This is the first real-world test of cross-chain DeFi solvency — if the coalition fails, restaking-collateralized lending may not survive 2026.
the_details: Attacker minted 116,500 unbacked rsETH by abusing Kelp's LayerZero bridge messaging.
Aave TVL plunged $10B post-exploit as lenders pulled funds from impaired collateral.
Coalition includes restakers and bridge operators trying to reissue backing across 20 chains.

stories.headline: Crypto's worst month in a year: $606M stolen in 18 days of April
stories.tldr: Hackers have lifted $606.2M from crypto protocols in just the first 18 days of April — 3.7x what the entire first quarter of 2026 lost combined.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Two state-actor-grade exploits inside three weeks suggest pre-signed transaction and bridge-layer attacks are the new attack surface, not smart-contract bugs.
the_details: April 1: Drift Protocol drained $285M via Solana 'durable nonces' — North Korea suspected.
April 19: Kelp DAO hit for $292M through LayerZero bridge messaging exploit.
Smaller hits: CoW Swap, Zerion, Rhea Finance and Silo Finance also compromised this month.

stories.headline: TOKEN2049 Dubai pushed to April 2027 over UAE security risks
stories.tldr: TOKEN2049 organizers postponed the Dubai conference by a full year to April 21–22, 2027, citing deteriorating security conditions across the United Arab Emirates.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Losing the Middle East's flagship crypto gathering reroutes deal flow and capital introductions to Singapore and Hong Kong for the rest of 2026.
the_details: Original 2026 dates scrapped; venue and sponsors expected to roll forward intact.
Decision follows heightened regional security concerns across UAE in recent weeks.
TOKEN2049 Singapore in October now becomes the year's only flagship event.

stories.headline: Jupiter unlocks 1.54% of supply today — $9.67M JUP hits market
stories.tldr: Solana DEX aggregator Jupiter is unlocking 1.54% of circulating JUP supply today, releasing roughly $9.67M of tokens into a market already wobbling under L1 weakness.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: SOL is already pinned near $86 with 92% of ETF inflows gone — fresh JUP supply tests whether Solana's flagship app token can absorb dilution mid-correction.
the_details: Unlock represents 1.54% of circulating JUP, valued at ~$9.67M at current prices.
Comes as Solana spot ETF inflows collapsed from $419M (Nov 2025) to $34M in April.
Firedancer upgrade still on track for 1M TPS, providing the bull case if supply absorbs.
